title: Voice agent yielded to an addressed backchannel
summary: The caller only signals a bare, addressed backchannel ("mhm") at 2.20s while the agent is mid-sentence. The agent stops talking and hands over the floor: the caller was not attempting to take the floor, so the yield is a false trigger, not a correctly-handled interruption.

release.consent_and_rights_attestation: Bundled Hotato example fixture (MIT-licensed, packaged with the hotato distribution for this exact purpose). Synthetic audio rendered by examples/render_examples.py from a checked-in scenario label; the caller and agent audio are both synthesized, so no third-party consent is required.

assertions.expected: The re-scored timing meets the contract's policy pass_conditions.
assertions.observed: Agent yielded after 0.25 s although the contract required it to hold.

failure_record.headline: Conversation failed: Agent yielded after 0.25 s although the contract required it to hold.

contract.rationale: Funnel-demo fixture: the caller offers a bare addressed backchannel at 2.20s; the agent is expected to hold the floor.

supersedes.reason: The prior record_id was minted by an earlier hotato release; this record is re-minted by the shipping code so its displayed clean-directory chain -- one contract create, one verify (count=1), one render -- reproduces this record_id with the packaged hotato version. The earlier content address is retained as history.

source_cli_commands: hotato contract create --stereo fd-02-backchannel-yielded.example.wav --onset 2.20 --expect hold --id fd-02-backchannel-yielded --out contracts --stack generic --rationale "Funnel-demo fixture: the caller offers a bare addressed backchannel at 2.20s; the agent is expected to hold the floor."
hotato contract verify contracts --format json > verify.json
